# Moon Studios

Moon Studios is a family-friendly salon in Andheri East, Marol, Mumbai serving women, men, and kids.

Core services:
- Haircuts and styling
- Balayage hair colour
- Nanoplastia hair treatment
- Olaplex hair treatment
- Hydra Medi Facial
- Facials, threading, waxing, manicure, pedicure, and grooming

Location:
- Shop C13, Harmony Apartments, Krishanlal Marwah Marg, Ashok Nagar, Andheri East, Mumbai 400072

Hours:
- Open daily from 9:30 AM to 9:00 PM

Phone:
- +91 90048 32184

Priority pages:
- https://moonstudiossalon.in/
